ismg.criterion: Applying digital literacy skills in a directorial vision

descriptors:
application of digital literacy skills enhances communication by making connections
between ideas
application of digital literacy skills to communicate ideas
use of digital media and drama terminology in the directorial vision
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

manipulation shapes a vision that synthesises dramatic languages to reveal layers of
meaning in the transformed work

evaluation reveals the interrelationship between purpose, context and meaning using
discriminating examples

conventions to shape a coherent directorial vision

meaning using relevant examples

communicate stylistic characteristics within dramatic action and meaning

dramatic action and meaning to transform an inherited published text into Contemporary

evaluation of the use of dramatic languages to communicate dramatic meaning for a

manipulation of elements of drama and conventions to shape dramatic action to suit the

explanation of elements of drama and conventions to communicate dramatic context or

use of elements of drama and conventions
organisation of ideas to interpret text
use of elements of drama or conventions
communication of selected text and context
